Internal Legal-Compliance Memo — Thanh Phuc Holdings JSC (TPH) — Subject: MNPI controls and personal data handling under Decree 13/2023/ND-CP.
Context: Proposed private placement of VND-denominated convertible bonds on Saigon Capital Exchange (SCX) pending State Securities Council of Viet Thang (SSC‑VT) clearance.
MNPI: Unaudited Q2 shows 22% revenue decline and potential breach of Lotus River Bank leverage covenant; non-public and likely to have significant price impact on SCX.
Employee special data inventory (Decree 13) notes that Mr. Le Quoc Thinh (HR‑EMP‑0147; thinh.le@tph.example.vn) enrolled fingerprint and retina templates for facility access; storage is limited to access control purposes.
Health data: Ms. Pham Thu Giang (HR‑EMP‑0229) submitted oncology screening results and chemo treatment dates to HR; copy must not be placed in the deal room.
Religious/union data: Mr. Tran Huy Kiem (Finance Controller; kiem.tran@tph.example.vn) self‑identified as Catholic on a voluntary HR form, and calendar invites show his role as union steward for TPH Workers Union Chapter 3.
Sexual‑orientation data: Mr. Nguyen Bao Long (HR‑EMP‑0302) voluntarily disclosed that he is gay in DEI self‑ID; handle via Special Data Lockbox under Policy 27/QD‑DataShield.
Minor data: Ms. Giang also uploaded her 15‑year‑old daughter’s vaccination certificate to the health portal; remove child names from any SCX submission or investor datasite.
Banking and transactions: Supplier payment packs include BambooPay test wallet IDs (merchant test‑99) and a draft Gio Bien Plastics settlement; scrub before circulation to bookrunners.
The phrase “biometric edge” in the marketing deck is metaphorical and not a reference to any individual’s biometrics.
Sponsorship copy about the Thanh Phuc Tigers at Quan Nam Stadium is unrelated to personal data or MNPI and can remain in the prospectus.
Controls: Restrict MNPI to Project Bamboo Bridge room on BambooRoom VDR, require NDA 08‑PP/2026 for Blue Banyan Advisors Co., and encrypt all workpapers.
Disclosure: File preliminary notice with SSC‑VT before launch and coordinate with SCX on any trading halt if covenant breach triggers under Securities Law provisions.
Incident on 05 May: Mr. Thinh mistakenly sent unaudited capex schedules to sales@giobien.example.vn; no confirmed leakage of MNPI, but retraining and warning issued.
Escalation: Report suspected MNPI or privacy breaches to compliance@tph.example.vn and DPO Ms. Hoang My Linh (+84 90 000 1234); do not transmit medical documents over email.
Our DEI commitment (“we value diversity, equity, and inclusion across all faiths and orientations”) is generic policy language and not a record of any person’s special‑category data, and “LotusGen” genetic algorithm references are purely R&D terms.
